title: Total War: THREE KINGDOMS

notes: Have had a MUCH better experience using the Windows version of this game in Proton vs using than the native version. This has been due in large part to serious bugs that are fixed in the more current windows version. I recommend playing this game in Proton and to avoid the outdated and buggy native linux version for this game.
